question: Is the wooden sign text exactly "PIXEL GENERAL STORE: Supplies, Maps, and Trinkets All Here" (including the colon and commas)?
Is the wooden sign text rendered in a pixel font (16-bit style) rather than a smooth or anti-aliased font?
Is the dialogue box text exactly "Shopkeeper: Don't rush off yet! Organize your inventory first, then decide which path to take." (including apostrophe and punctuation)?
Is the dialogue box text rendered in a pixel UI font consistent with a 16-bit game UI?
Is the dialogue text contained within a dialogue box UI element?
Is the quest scroll text exactly "QUEST: Find the key under the Old Bridge, then deliver it to the North Gate Guard" (including the colon and comma)?
Is the quest text rendered in a pixel faux-parchment font style?
Is the quest text displayed on a scroll located on the counter?
Is the price board text exactly "Health Potion 120 Gold each; Antidote 90 Gold each" (including the semicolon)?
Is the price board text rendered in a dot-matrix pixel font style?
Is the price text displayed on a board on the wall?
Is the status panel text exactly "EXP = Current + Quest Bonus  Gold = 1000 - 240 + 50" (including equals signs, math symbols, and spacing)?
Is the status panel text rendered in a monospace pixel font?
Is the status panel text located on the right side of the image?
Is the spelling of the mini-map labels "North Gate → Woodland  South Gate → Docks  West Gate → Old Town" correct, including the arrow symbols?
Are the mini-map labels rendered in a tiny pixel font style?
Are the mini-map labels placed at the edge of a mini-map?
Is the receipt popup text exactly "Transaction Log: Purchased 2 Health Potions, Total 240 Gold" (including colon and comma)?
Is the transaction text displayed on a receipt popup at the cashier window?
Is the graffiti hint text exactly "TIP: Damage = Attack x 2 + 10, Don't rely on luck and crits alone!" (including punctuation and math symbols)?
Is the graffiti hint rendered in a pixel handwriting font style?
Is the graffiti hint displayed as corner graffiti?
Do any of the rendered text elements exhibit garbled characters, missing strokes, or unrecognizable symbols?
Is the overall image rendered in a 16-bit pixel game screenshot style (non-realistic, clear pixel edges)?
Are visible UI frames present in the image as expected for a game screenshot?
Is all text in the image pixel-sharp with clear edges (no blur or anti-aliasing)?
Is there any ghosting effect or double-imaging around any text?
Is any of the text mirrored or reversed?
